envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key — get from simmer.markets/dashboard

envVars.name: THRESHOLD_PROBABILITY
envVars.description: Your probability estimate (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.70. Remix with your model's predictions.

envVars.name: TRADE_SIDE
envVars.description: Which side to trade: YES or NO. Default: YES

envVars.name: SIMMER_VENUE
envVars.description: Trading venue: 'sim' for paper trading, 'polymarket' for real money. Default: sim

envVars.name: SIMMER_MIN_EV
envVars.description: Minimum edge to trade (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.03 (3% edge)

envVars.name: SIMMER_KELLY_MULTIPLIER
envVars.description: Kelly fraction for position sizing (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.25 (quarter Kelly)

envVars.name: MAX_POSITION_SIZE
envVars.description: Maximum position size in USD. Default: 100.0
